About RSN

20 years of precision
in British Columbia.

RSN Kitchen Cabinets Ltd. specializes in custom cabinetry, architectural millwork, and bespoke interior woodwork for large-scale residential homes and commercial developments. Based in Greater Vancouver, we serve clients across British Columbia. From initial design consultation through to final installation, every project is delivered to the same standard.

We work with homeowners, interior designers, developers, and general contractors. Our scope covers full kitchen builds, custom millwork panels, built-in cabinetry, closet systems, commercial millwork, and custom paint matching to any specified finish.

20+
Years Experience
500+
Projects Delivered
100%

What We Do

Built for every space.

01

Design Consultation

Full design consultation covering layout, material specification, finish selection, and custom paint matching. We scope every project in detail before a single cut is made.

02

Custom Cabinetry and Millwork

Precision-built cabinetry and architectural millwork panels for kitchens, closets, bathrooms, offices, and commercial interiors. Residential and development-scale scope.

03

Renovation and Installation

Cabinet refacing, refinishing, and full replacement. Turnkey installation with full site coordination. Serving Metro Vancouver, Vancouver Island & the Okanagan.

Our Work

Projects that speak
for themselves.

Residential homes, commercial offices and medical facilities. The same standard throughout.

FAQ

Common questions.

Do you serve Kelowna, Penticton, and the Okanagan?

Yes. We travel for the right project and have completed work throughout Kelowna, Penticton, Vernon, West Kelowna, and surrounding communities. Contact us for a consultation.

Do you work on Vancouver Island and Victoria?

Yes. We serve Victoria, Saanich, Langford, and greater Vancouver Island. Same standard of work regardless of location.

Do you handle commercial projects?

Yes. We do commercial millwork for dental offices, medical facilities, retail spaces, and offices across BC. Same quality as our residential work.

How do I get a quote?

Call or email us — we respond the same day. We offer free consultations and can work with your designer, contractor, or directly with you.

What areas in Metro Vancouver do you cover?

All of Metro Vancouver including Surrey, Burnaby, Vancouver, Coquitlam, Richmond, Langley, North Vancouver, Delta, New Westminster, and the Lower Mainland.

How long have you been in business?

Over 20 years. RSN Kitchen Cabinets Ltd. has been building custom cabinetry and millwork across British Columbia since the early 2000s.

Based in Greater Vancouver. Serving Metro Vancouver, Vancouver Island & the Okanagan.
